arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Roy Keane makes 'swagger' claim as Mikel Arteta gives telling reaction to Man Utd draw
arts.sum: Arsenal's Premier League title bid took another huge blow on Sunday as they were held to a disappointing 1-1 draw against a struggling Manchester United side, with the Gunners now 15 points behind their rivals

arts.ttl: Arsenal make Andrea Berta breakthrough as Mikel Arteta eyes three-step plan
arts.sum: The Gunners had a disastrous January transfer window, so Mikel Arteta will be hoping Andrea Berta can welcome some new faces to the Emirates Stadium in the summer." According to the Evening Standard, Arsenal are closing in on a deal to appoint Andrea Berta as their new sporting director.

arts.ttl: How Arsenal's next five fixtures compare to Liverpool's after Man Utd draw
arts.sum: Comparing Arsenal & Liverpool's next five Premier League fixtures.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'send scouts' to watch 15-goal Frenchman as Andrea Berta faces transfer dilemma
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool reportedly all had scouts in attendance to watch Inter Milan striker Marcus Thuram in Wednesday's Champions League clash with Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Wall distance or keeper error? Why did Arsenal concede from Fernandes free-kick?
arts.sum: Shay Given and Wayne Rooney debate whether the distance of Arsenal's wall from the ball or David Raya's positioning caused them to concede from Bruno Fernandes' free-kick goal in their 1-1 draw with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Pundits: Arsenal can win everything if they sign a striker
arts.sum: After the match, Premier League pundits Ian Wright and Owen Hargreaves insisted the Gunners' priority in the summer transfer market must be a new striker if they want to win trophies. Former Manchester United midfielder Hargreaves compared Liverpool's striking options with Arsenal's, highlighting the difficulties the latter face without Bukayo Saka, who has been sidelined since December.

arts.ttl: Man United fans finally get something to cheer about as Ruben Amorim's men show signs of life to thwart Arsenal, writes IAN LADYMAN
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: The stark truth about most football fans is that they are malleable. Give them something to cheer on the field and they will go home happy and turn up again next time round.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane sends Arsenal devastating home truths in angry rant after Man United draw
arts.sum: Former Manchester United captain Roy Keane has told Arsenal to worry about teams directly below them in a blistering rant following the Gunners' draw at Old Trafford on Sunday. "I am not seeing an Arsenal team turning up today and thinking: ‘I tell you what, they were machine-like, they knew United were there for the taking.' They were not even ready to take that step.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Attacking issues remain for Man Utd and Arsenal
arts.sum: "We tried to choose the best moments to press high, and we created chances to win the game," Amorim told Sky Sports, explaining his side's second-half advances. For 45 minutes, Arsenal weren’t confronted at all until they entered the final third, a novel sight for United supporters at Old Trafford and perhaps a sign Amorim saw how PSV Eindhoven conceded seven at home to the Gunners after opening up in midweek.

arts.ttl: Anthony Taylor Made Error Which Helped Manchester United vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Christian Eriksen revealed he had noticed a crucial mistake from referee Anthony Taylor prior to Man United's goal in the 1-1 draw with Arsenal.
